creator: rz@fabmicro.ru
text:
Just upgraded textproc/belr, now I get this:

[19:48:09:635][0x81326e020][Info]"Running app..."
[19:48:09:688][0x81326e020][Info]"Activated selectors:" ("custom", "C", "unix", "freebsd", "freebsd")
[19:48:09:689][0x81326e020][Info]"Registering types..."
[19:48:09:689][0x81326e020][Info]"Registering shared types..."
[19:48:09:690][0x81326e020][Info]"Registering tool types..."
[19:48:09:690][0x81326e020][Info]"Registering shared tool types..."
[19:48:09:812][0x81326e020][Info]"Loading main view..."
[19:48:09:955][0x81326e020][Info]"Launch async core creation."
[19:48:10:018][0x81326e020][Info]Core is starting  "Starting up"
ld-elf.so.1: /usr/local/lib/libmediastreamer.so.11: Undefined symbol "bzrtp_initCache_lock"


Seems like there's a mess in packages repo right now.
